specs.reason: R1 - Defines AST node structure for decorators and decorated functions/classes. Critical for representing full PEP 614 expressions in decorator position.
R1 - Expression parsing is core to supporting full decorator expressions (calls, subscripts, attribute access like @f(), @obj.attr, @list[0])
R3 - Function and class statement parsing handles decorator parsing and application. Must support arbitrary expressions in decorator position.
R1 - Decorator Desugaring: covers transformation of @deco(arg) def f: ... to f = deco(arg)(f). Essential for full decorator expression support.
Type inference and special-case handling for decorators. Must support decorator return-type inference beyond Any/unknown fallback. Special-case @property, @staticmethod, @classmethod.

scope_summary: Gather specifications for implementing full PEP 614 decorator support: enabling any expression as a decorator (calls, subscripts, attribute access), improving type inference from Any/unknown to precise types, while preserving hardcoded semantics for @property, @staticmethod, @classmethod.
